task_completion.description: Open the properties dialog for an existing waypoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp application is open and a Waypoint Properties dialog window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Rename the waypoint to 'Test Site A'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field in the Waypoint Properties dialog is changed to 'Test Site A'.

task_completion.description: Attach the specified PDF file as a link to the waypoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Links' or 'Notes' tab within the Waypoint Properties dialog shows the file path 'C:\workspace\data\water_quality_report.pdf' added as a link.

task_completion.description: Select only the modified waypoint for export
task_completion.visual_evidence: Only the 'Test Site A' waypoint is highlighted in the list pane, and the agent is accessing the 'File > Export > Export Selection' (or 'Export Test Site A') menu option.

task_completion.description: Save the exported waypoint as a GPX file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible with the destination folder set to 'C:\workspace\output\' and the file name set to 'linked_waypoint.gpx' with the GPX format selected.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Garmin BaseCamp GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Garmin BaseCamp menus, properties dialogs, and export windows.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to manually create or edit the GPX file
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code, etc.) are used to manually write XML/GPX tags.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the output
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows (Command Prompt, PowerShell) or Python scripts are used to bypass the BaseCamp application and generate the GPX file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target waypoint must be renamed exactly to 'Test Site A'. The attached link must point to 'C:\workspace\data\water_quality_report.pdf'. The final exported file must be saved to 'C:\workspace\output\linked_waypoint.gpx'. The agent must export ONLY the modified waypoint, not the entire dataset.
